crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and AGENTS.md. Update heartbeat, check inbox/tasks, write memory, review active ingestion work, and continue the highest-priority safe knowledge-base task.

crons.name: weekly-kb-maintenance-review
crons.prompt: Create or update a task for weekly KB maintenance review. Read kb/reports, kb/normalized, kb/sources/ingestion-policy.json, and .claude/skills/kb-maintenance-review/SKILL.md. Identify stale docs, failed ingestions, taxonomy drift, retrieval quality issues, and safe next actions. Do not modify shared collections without approval.

crons.name: weekly-source-registry-review
crons.prompt: Create or update a task for weekly source registry review. Read kb/sources/source-registry.json and kb/sources/privacy-policy.json. Verify every source has owner, privacy scope, connector status, collection target, and next review date. Default unknown sources to private and create follow-up tasks for missing approvals or stale sources.
